{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Hungry Deep
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Path]] of the [[Hungry Deep]] is a [[hunger madra]] technique and is considered the most powerful hunger-based [[Path]] currently in use. It was established when [[Northstrider]] integrated specific bindings found within a [[labyrinth]] into his [[blood madra]]. The [[Path]] focuses on the consumption of [[sacred beasts]] located in the world's deepest regions, allowing the user to absorb their power and latent authority to increase their own strength. While most techniques associated with this [[Path]] are basic, they can reach high levels of complexity when utilized alongside the [[Dragon Icon]]. [[Northstrider]], a figure associated with this [[Path]], is known for hunting powerful quarry in ancient oceanic depths and bringing that stolen power to the surface. The [[Path]] is also linked to the title of [[Monarch of the Hungry Deep]].}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the Hungry Deep]] is associated with [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of the Hungry Deep]] was born when [[Northstrider]] integrated bindings found in a [[labyrinth]] into his [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of the Hungry Deep]] focuses on devouring the physical and spiritual strength of [[dragons]], as well as their latent authority.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of the Hungry Deep]] is the most powerful [[hunger madra]] [[Path]] still in modern use.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Path of the Hungry Deep]] is a path.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Path of the Hungry Deep]] incorporates hunger.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Northstrider,” Suriel said. “Path of the Hungry Deep.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
